reason: Frontend spec index for required pre-development and implementation conventions
Wishlist pages/cards/forms must follow local component structure, accessibility, Tailwind token, and interaction patterns
Wishlist store should mirror local-first Zustand persistence and fire-and-forget sync conventions
New WishlistItem/WishlistPriority types and optional process/roast fields must follow strict TypeScript patterns
Implementation must satisfy frontend build, forbidden pattern, and interaction quality rules
New Supabase wishlist_items table and row conversion must follow database, RLS, and snake_case mapping conventions
Feature spans UI, store, persistence, Supabase, and Bean conversion boundaries
Reuse existing Bean form, country selector, flavor tag, toast, confirm, and sync patterns where appropriate
